Using a microplane, grate garlice into a fine paste.
Place garlic oroshi, yuzu juice, sushi vinegar, and tosazu into a mixing bowl and combine with a whisk.
While whisking, add in grapeseed oil in a steady slow stream to emulsify.
Reserve in a quart container and store in the cooler
